title: LIKE join: BATfetchjoin does not hit always
poc: select * from sys.tables, x where name like s;
key_bug_features: LIKE join with variable does not always return results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name STRING, description STRING DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'example', 'This is an example entry');
CREATE TABLE join_table (join_id INT, join_name STRING NOT NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table, join_table WHERE name LIKE join_name;
